name: Wanpy Dog Treats - Lamb Jerky Slices 100g
shortDescription: Wanpy Soft Oven Roasted Lamb Jerky Slices are 100% natural, high-protein, low-fat dog treats made with real lamb. Perfect for training rewards and healthy snacking.
description: Wanpy Soft Oven Roasted Lamb Jerky Slices Dog Treats are premium, all-natural dog treats made with real lamb as the first ingredient . These soft, chewy jerky slices are high in protein and low in fat, making them an ideal reward during training sessions or a healthy snack between meals. Carefully oven-roasted to lock in flavor and nutrients, these lamb jerky treats deliver irresistible taste while supporting strong bones, healthy digestion, and overall vitality. The resealable packaging ensures long-lasting freshness and convenience. Key Features & Benefits Real Lamb as First Ingredient – High-quality animal protein for superior nutrition 100% Natural Formula – Healthy and safe training reward High Protein, Low Fat – Supports lean muscle and healthy weight Soft & Chewy Texture – Easy to chew and highly palatable Supports Strong Bones – Nutrient-rich recipe promotes bone health Aids Healthy Digestion – Gentle on the stomach Perfect Training Treat – Ideal for rewards and positive reinforcement Resealable Pack – Keeps treats fresh for longer Health Benefits Helps maintain muscle strength and energy Supports digestive health Promotes strong bones and overall wellness Encourages positive training behavior Feeding Recommendations Feed as a complementary treat between meals . Do not substitute for a complete meal. Always ensure your dog has access to fresh, clean drinking water. Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place. Reseal the bag after opening to preserve freshness.
